The question is asking to identify two people who are both 28 years old. Since each row represents an individual with their name and age, we can group the data by the "age" column to filter out those who are 28. Once filtered, we can list the names of individuals from that group. We can use the f_group_column(age) operation to group the data by age to find the individuals who meet the age requirement.
Explanation: Both Craig Phillips and Sada Wilkington are listed as being 28 years old. Therefore, the two people who are both 28 years old are Craig Phillips and Sada Wilkington.
